title: thecophyllum palustre
intro: Thecophyllum palustre is a type of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as the marsh tea or marsh willow-herb. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thecophyllum palustre include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Thecophyllum palustre can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
